name: Sugar and Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg and molasses.
3. Add baking soda, salt, cinnamon, cloves, ginger, and flour. Mix well.
4. Form the dough into small balls.
5. Roll each ball in a mixture of granulated sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes until golden brown.
